interface_check: Verify UART2/3/4/6, M1-M4, LED and buzzer pads
verify_on_receipt: Revision label, 5.5 g mass, hole fit, USB connection
blocker_or_caveat: Must be v1.5 and use ArduPilot 4.6+

required_accessories: matching JST-SH cable or loose leads, XT30 pigtail, capacitor if required
interface_check: Compare connector pin order with Kakute before power
verify_on_receipt: Exact model, 20x20 M2 holes, 3 g mass, no short circuits
blocker_or_caveat: Legacy part; substitute only if standalone stock cannot be confirmed

interface_check: Confirm 1.5 mm shaft/T-mount and lead reach
verify_on_receipt: 3.8 g each, shaft and bell dimensions, winding resistance

interface_check: Confirm T-mount screw pattern and guard clearance
verify_on_receipt: 0.88 g each, correct CW/CCW count, no warping
blocker_or_caveat: No speculative fallback prop; mass freeze is primary shortfall response

required_accessories: LiHV balance charger, LiPo bag, JST-XH balance compatibility
interface_check: XT30 polarity and charger LiHV mode
verify_on_receipt: 29 g +/-1 g, dimensions, cell voltage, internal resistance, damage
blocker_or_caveat: Confirm battery logistics before order; substitution reopens all power screens

required_accessories: header/castellated wiring, 5 V and ground leads
interface_check: UART at 3.3 V VDDIO_EXT to Kakute UART2
verify_on_receipt: Approx. 20 g, camera/IMU/ToF operation, 105 mA reference capture
blocker_or_caveat: No microSD socket; numeric Stage 1 logs go to FC

interface_check: One MSP v2 UART to Kakute UART4
verify_on_receipt: 2 g, correct L051/F051 board size, sensor initialization
blocker_or_caveat: EOL; substitute only if stock cannot be confirmed

exact_part_or_sku: BetaFPV ELRS Lite Flat Antenna V1.2
interface_check: Full duplex CRSF on Kakute UART6
verify_on_receipt: 0.46 g, correct version, bind and telemetry test
2.7 g, charge, manual disarm, battery-ejection alarm
blocker_or_caveat: WS2812 LED is a separate allowance

exact_part_or_sku: XT30, 22 AWG power wire, 26 AWG signal wire, JST-SH/GH housings
interface_check: Continuity and polarity map for every harness
verify_on_receipt: Finished harness mass and voltage drop
blocker_or_caveat: Final mass remains an allowance until built

exact_part_or_sku: M2 steel motor screws; M2 nylon standoffs; Kakute grommets
interface_check: Verify screw depth cannot touch motor windings
blocker_or_caveat: Do not assume generic M2.5 hardware fits

exact_part_or_sku: 1-2 kg calibrated load cell, current/voltage logger, tachometer if available
interface_check: Measure voltage at ESC input rather than supply setting
blocker_or_caveat: Must resolve 7.0 V thrust/current gates before mass freeze
